SELECT c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE c.city = '上海' AND o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE c.city = '上海' AND o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_id, c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| ORDER total_sales DESC

SELECT c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN_PATH orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id ; order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE c.city = '上海' AND o.status = 'paid'
GROUP c.customer_id, c.customer_name
ORDER total_sales DESC

(query (source customers c) (join (orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id) (order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id)) (filter (c.city = '上海' AND o.status = 'paid')) (group c.customer_name) (aggregate (c.customer_name) (SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales)) (order total_sales DESC))

SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity

JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', o.order_date) = '2025'
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 3;

FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid' AND o.order_date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31'
| GROUP p.product_id, p.product_name
| AGG p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
| ORDER total_quantity DESC
| LIMIT 3

SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM products p
JOIN_PATH order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id ; orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31'
GROUP p.product_name
ORDER total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 3

(query (source products p) (join (order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id) (orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id)) (filter (o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date < '2026-01-01')) (group p.product_name) (aggregate (p.product_name) (SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_qty)) (order total_qty DESC) (limit 3))

SELECT c.city, COUNT(o.order_id) AS paid_order_count
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.city

WHERE o.status = 'paid'

HAVING COUNT(o.order_id) > 1
ORDER order_count DESC

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date
FROM customers c
JOIN_PATH orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
GROUP c.customer_id, c.customer_name
ORDER last_order_date DESC

(query (source customers c) (join (orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id)) (group c.customer_id c.customer_name) (aggregate (c.customer_id c.customer_name) (MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date)) (project (c.customer_name) (last_order_date)) (order last_order_date DESC))

SELECT p.category, MAX(oi.unit_price) AS highest_unit_price
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY p.category ASC;

FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| GROUP p.category
| AGG p.category, MAX(oi.unit_price) AS max_unit_price
| ORDER max_unit_price DESC

SELECT p.category, MAX(oi.unit_price) AS max_unit_price
FROM products p
JOIN_PATH order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
GROUP p.category
(query (source products p) (join (order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id)) (group p.category) (aggregate (p.category) (MAX(oi.unit_price) AS max_unit_price)))

SELECT c.city, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.city
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 10000
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.city
| AGG c.city, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| HAVING total_sales > 10000
| SELECT c.city, total_sales
| ORDER total_sales DESC

SELECT c.city, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN_PATH orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id ; order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP c.city
HAVING total_sales > 10000
ORDER total_sales DESC

(query (source customers c) (join (orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id) (order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id)) (filter (o.status = 'paid')) (group c.city) (aggregate (c.city) (SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales)) (having (SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 10000)) (project (c.city) (total_sales)) (order total_sales DESC))

SELECT c.level, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.level
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 5000
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.level
| AGG c.level, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| HAVING total_sales > 5000
| ORDER total_sales DESC

SELECT c.level, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN_PATH orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id ; order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP c.level
HAVING total_sales > 5000

(query (source customers c) (join (orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id) (order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id)) (filter (o.status = 'paid')) (group c.level) (aggregate (c.level) (SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales)) (having (total_sales > 5000)) (project (c.level) (total_sales)))
